Child securityChild protection is our main priority.We do not knowingly contact or do business with children under 13 years of age. If a parent or guardian becomes aware that a child under the age of 13 has attempted to contact and/or do business with us, please advise us by email at hongsoncuchuoi123@gmail.com so that we may rectify the situation.

Under no circumstance. MegaShark Developer Design will not collect sensitive information from children or from minors and all its mobile apps include strict parental controls in order to protect children from accidental purchases or unwanted publicity.We also advise reading this privacy policy since by allowing your children to use our services you are agreeing to this privacy policy on their behalf. If you disagree, please do not allow your child to use our apps.
